testcase.name: test_auth_login_and_token_contract

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=8080): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/v1/auth/login (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=8080): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused"))

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:204: in _new_conn sock = connection.create_connection( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/connection.py:85: in create_connection raise err /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/connection.py:73: in create_connection sock.connect(sa) E ConnectionRefusedError: [Errno 111] Connection refused
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:787: in urlopen response = self._make_request( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:493: in _make_request conn.request( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:500: in request self.endheaders() /usr/local/lib/python3.11/http/client.py:1318: in endheaders self._send_output(message_body, encode_chunked=encode_chunked) /usr/local/lib/python3.11/http/client.py:1078: in _send_output self.send(msg) /usr/local/lib/python3.11/http/client.py:1016: in send self.connect() /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:331: in connect self.sock = self._new_conn() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:219: in _new_conn raise NewConnectionError( E urllib3.exceptions.NewConnectionError: HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=8080): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py:645: in send resp = conn.urlopen( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:841: in urlopen retries = retries.increment( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/retry.py:535: in increment raise MaxRetryError(_pool, url, reason) from reason # type: ignore[arg-type] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E urllib3.exceptions.MaxRetryError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=8080): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/v1/auth/login (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=8080): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused"))
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_api_v1_contract.py:34: in test_auth_login_and_token_contract response = api_client.post(f"{api_base_url}/api/v1/auth/login", json=auth_payload, timeout=10) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:640: in post return self.request("POST", url, data=data, json=json, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:592: in request resp = self.send(prep, **send_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:706: in send r = adapter.send(request, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py:678: in send raise ConnectionError(e, request=request) E requests.exceptions.ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=8080): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/v1/auth/login (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=8080): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused"))

testcase.name: test_protected_targets_requires_bearer

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=8080): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/v1/targets (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=8080): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused"))

testcase.name: test_pentest_flow_create_authorize_start_stop

testcase.name: test_risk_matrix_contract_5x5

testcase.name: test_websocket_endpoint_path_contract

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=8080): Max retries exceeded with url: /ws/pentest/test-contract (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=8080): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused"))
